examples: The paper also gives the range of stability of key block of voussoir beam and measures to be taken in various conditions.
Through the analysis of jig, the air operated jig was used which is composed by the voussoir-roller aggregate unit to solve the present production problems.
The major factors that affect the stability of the structure are rotational angle of the voussoir beam, ratio of length and height, rock type and height of carrying rock strata.
